The method involves using an electromagnetic field to pull the particles in the smog down to the ground, where they can be cleaned up. The article also mentions that it's similar to when a balloon with static electricity attracts hair. The example with the balloon and static is just an analogy to explain how the electromagnetic field works. So option B is the most accurate based on the description.
